export declare const ShadowDomTargetContext: import('solid-js').Context<ShadowRoot | undefined>; export declare const DevtoolsOnCloseContext: import('solid-js').Context<{ onCloseClick: (e: MouseEvent & { currentTarget: HTMLButtonElement; target: Element; }) => void; } | undefined>; export declare const useDevtoolsOnClose: () => { onCloseClick: (e: MouseEvent & { currentTarget: HTMLButtonElement; target: Element; }) => void; };
